comments.message:
You're being quite nitpicky about the stats I provide while providing none yourself and feeling pretty fine with your massive exaggerations don't you think ? :p

As I said, it's an approximation of activity. Old players are unlikely to come back to the game just to play one game in 3 months, most osu players play by phases : they're either playing a lot or they're not playing at all (or transitioning from one phase to the other). So yes it's not perfect but your example is very unrealistic.

Alr 99% was an exaggeration, is 5/100 so 95% also an exaggeration or is it your final word ? :p Cause it's difficult for me to provide stats to counter your claim if you switch your claim every message lol
Give me an actual stat you believe in, what you consider to be top players, and then we can talk.

And I never argued top players were in majority lazer mains btw. My guess from what I've seen is maybe 10-20% main lazer, 40% main stable and the rest are inactive or are switching between the 2, something like that. Maybe you can check if you want instead of playing bad faith simulator.
comments.message_html:
You're being quite nitpicky about the stats I provide while providing none yourself and feeling pretty fine with your massive exaggerations don't you think ? :p

As I said, it's an approximation of activity. Old players are unlikely to come back to the game just to play one game in 3 months, most osu players play by phases : they're either playing a lot or they're not playing at all (or transitioning from one phase to the other). So yes it's not perfect but your example is very unrealistic.

Alr 99% was an exaggeration, is 5/100 so 95% also an exaggeration or is it your final word ? :p Cause it's difficult for me to provide stats to counter your claim if you switch your claim every message lol
Give me an actual stat you believe in, what you consider to be top players, and then we can talk.

And I never argued top players were in majority lazer mains btw. My guess from what I've seen is maybe 10-20% main lazer, 40% main stable and the rest are inactive or are switching between the 2, something like that. Maybe you can check if you want instead of playing bad faith simulator.

comments.message:
социальный комментарий который вероятно останется без внимания.
но аспен не виноват, что кучка нищих анимешнеков захайпило его сонг чойс.
Я даже уверен аспен изначально считал свою мапу гавнищем.
Просто почему то кто то ето захайпил искуственно, и такой прикол как будто теряется если думать так же как я щас подумал, но вы можете так не думать.

Ориг мапу аспена я на самом деле заметил еще примерно с 8 месяцев назад. когда на ней стакнулось 10к плеев и я понял что тип просто накидал гавна как кекрия на комнате в 2021 году. И щас по сути произошло с ним история когда к нему пришли и сказали " У ТЕБЯ ОЧЕНЬ ВКУСНЫЕ ЯЙЦА ДАВАЙ ОТСОСЕМ" и спецом взяли в оборот его мапсет, накидали ему гедешек и хайпанули искусствено гавно. Хотя я уверен что сам АСПЕН ну...
В рот ебал ранкать свою парашу. ахзхахах ладно надеюсь мой высер хотя бы просто за мат сотрут.

А так пацаны красавчики постарались хорошо я диффы зачекал <3 биг лоф фром однушка

included_comments.message:
person who made an account 10 years ago and plays one map every 3 month isnt exactly an active player, is he ? your chart doesnt show monthly playcount, and its the only way to tell how active someone is. 

obviously 99% was an exaggeration, but there are like 5 lazer players in the top100, which is far from 50%, let alone majority.

the chart you provided proves absolutely nothing, you claimed you have proof but you cant even provide any relevant statistic
